units.source_text: 1 2025年第四季境況及2024年第四季境況的五年平均分別按2026年第一季至2030年第四季20個季度及2025年第一季至2029年第四季20個季度的預測期間計算。
units.translation_target_text: 1 The five-year averages of the 2025 fourth quarter scenario and the 2024 fourth quarter scenario are calculated based on the forecast periods of 20 quarters from the first quarter of 2026 to the fourth quarter of 2030 and the 20 quarters from the first quarter of 2025 to the fourth quarter of 2029, respectively.
